description: Resolve a GPS coordinate to the REAL Singapore planning area name (e.g. Jurong East, Bedok, Tampines) and region. Use this BEFORE naming any area — never guess an area name from raw coordinates yourself.

inputs.name: lng
inputs.description: Longitude. Omit to use the caller's location from context.

inputs.name: lat
inputs.description: Latitude. Omit to use the caller's location from context.
